feature_goal_map.description: Real-time conversational AI that simulates job interviews, customer calls, daily conversations, and debate practice.
feature_goal_map.primary_goal: Build daily practice habit; drive W1 Retention and D30 Streak

feature_goal_map.description: Displays users' progress and ranking on the app's leaderboard
feature_goal_map.primary_goal: Drive engagement and encourage friendly competition among users
feature_goal_map.expected_outcome: Average engagement time increases by 30 minutes

feature_goal_map.description: Users check their progress report to see how they're doing and what improvements they need to make
feature_goal_map.primary_goal: Re-engage users who are inactive or at risk of churning
sub_goals: Trigger one micro-action with zero friction
Provide a sense of accomplishment and motivation
feature_goal_map.north_star_contribution: Improves Monthly Retention by re-engaging users
feature_goal_map.expected_outcome: Increase in user engagement and retention
